ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "current_club" TEXT /* Current club of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the current club expires */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Estimated market value of the player in thousands of dollars */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender) */,
  "minutes_played_overall" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "appearances_overall" INTEGER /* Total appearances by the player */,
  "goals_overall" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "goals_home" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player at home */,
  "goals_away" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player away */,
  "assists_overall" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "clean_sheets_overall" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets by the player */,
  "yellow_cards_overall" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards_overall" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "goals_per_90" REAL /* Average goals scored per 90 minutes played */,
  "assists_per_90" REAL /* Average assists made per 90 minutes played */,
  "clean_sheets_per_90" REAL /* Average clean sheets per 90 minutes played */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Total tackles won by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Total offside incidents by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Total penalties saved by the player (for goalkeepers) */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Total penalties missed by the player (for non-goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
